1992February 7, 1992

🇳🇴 Oslo, Norway

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Oslo, Norway, February 7, 1992 -- February 17, 1992

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-1992-02-oslo-norway

23 Resolutions

123Plenary
Instruct Secretariat to transmit revised final CD 10303-21 for DIS publication
SC 4 instructs its Secretariat to transmit the revised final CD 10303-21, without further balloting subject to consensus on resolution of outstanding issues, being approved for publication as ISO/D...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
122Plenary
Instruct Secretariat to transmit revised final CD 10303-11 for DIS publication
SC 4 instructs its Secretariat to transmit the revised final CD 10303-11 being approved for publication as ISO/DIS directly to the ISO Central Secretariat for registration and publication as a Draf...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
121Plenary
Direct WGs to develop application protocol interoperability methods
SC 4 directs its WG 4, 5, 6 & 7 to consider the development of methods and techniques to achieve application protocol interoperability and their implementation as a key priority requirement for STE...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
120Plenary
Request P-members to assure regular participation of PMAG representatives
SC 4 requests P-members to consider their PMAG representative assignments to assure that nominated members and alternates are available to participate regularly.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
119Plenary
Request position papers on coordinating externally developed APs
SC 4 requests position papers for consideration by PMAG on "Requirements for coordinating and qualifying APs developed externally to SC 4".
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
118Plenary
Encourage extra national effort for initial STEP release registration
SC 4 encourages extra national effort to support the plan for the registration of the initial release of STEP as DISs by 1 January 1993. Extra effort includes extra meetings for integration, qualif...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
117Plenary
Accept plan for registration of initial STEP release as DISs
SC 4 accepts the plan and schedule proposed by PMAG for the registration of the initial release of STEP as DISs by 1 January 1993.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
116Plenary
Direct WG 5 to report how Part Libraries requirement can be satisfied
With respect to the upward compatibility of EXPRESS, SC 4 directs WG 5 to consider the document SC 4/WG 2 N43 and to report to SC 4 at the next plenary meeting how the WG 2 requirement for Part Lib...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
115Plenary
Direct Secretariat to circulate SPAG documents N58 and N75 for P-member comment
SC 4 directs its secretariat to circulate SPAG document N58 and N75 for P-member comment by mid-June 1992.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
114Plenary
Adopt project Design Through Analysis of Composite and Metallic Structures
SC 4 adopts the project Design Through Analysis of Composite and Metallic Structures.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
113Plenary
Adopt six projects and appoint project leaders for P41-P46
SC 4 adopts the following six projects (PWA/PWB): * P41 Mechanical Design Using Wireframe, STEP Part 206 * P42 Sheet Metal Dies and Blocks, STEP Part 207 * P43 Life Cycle Product Change Process, ST...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
112Plenary
Consider Software Product Data NWI within SC 4 Area of Scope A
SC 4 considers that the NWI on Software Product Data falls in the SC 4 Area of Scope A on Product Data.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
111Plenary
Direct Secretariat to draw ISO Technical Board's attention to apparent scope overlaps
SC 4 directs its secretariat to draw the attention of the ISO Technical Board to apparent overlaps between the scopes of SC 4 and other ISO/TCs and SCs, and to request confirmation that the scope o...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
110Plenary
Direct WG 3 to propose an expert to liaise with ISO/TC 10/SC 5
SC 4 directs WG 3 to propose an expert to be appointed by SC 4 to liaise with the ISO/TC 10/SC 5 in the areas of draughting and tolerances.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
109Plenary
Adopt policy to share and coordinate resources with external standardization efforts
SC 4 adopts the policy that it shall endeavor to share and coordinate resources and results with any standardization effort outside SC 4 that is applicable to the SC 4 scope.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
108Plenary
Direct WG 8 and WG 7 to propose an expert to liaise with DCG group
SC 4 directs WG 8 and WG 7 to review the available documents on DCG and work together to propose an expert to be appointed by SC 4 to serve in the role of liaison with the DCG group.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
107Plenary
Direct Secretariat to review all existing liaisons for formal registration
SC 4 directs its secretariat to review all existing liaisons and to ensure that they have been formally registered by the Central Secretariat. Any liaisons not so registered shall be established by...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
106Plenary
Direct Secretariat to maintain a dated list of adopted SC 4 projects
SC 4 directs its secretariat to maintain a dated list of adopted SC 4 projects and of the corresponding appointed project leaders and to provide this list its members at each meeting.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
105Plenary
Direct Secretariat to maintain a dated list of Parts under development
Following SC 4 Resolution #84, SC 4 directs its secretariat to maintain a dated list of Parts to be developed or under development for each SC 4 standard and to provide these lists to members of SC...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
104Plenary
Adopt policy 4 of SC 4 N85 as GP#02 to approve SC 4 parts documents
Following SC 4 Resolution #84, SC 4 adopts policy #4 of SC 4 document N85 on "SC 4 documentation approval levels" as GP#02 to approve SC 4 parts documents as well as other SC 4 technical documents ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
103Plenary
Adopt SPAG N59 as the base line approved list of SC 4 areas of scope
To fulfil the objective #c5 of the SC 4 Strategic Policy, SC 4 adopts SPAG N59 as the base line approved list of SC 4 areas of scope, work items and projects existing on 1992-02-07.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
102Plenary
Adopt SPAG N64 to manage and approve the SC 4 programme of work
To fulfil the objective #c5 of the SC 4 Strategic Policy and the SC 4 Resolution #90, SC 4 adopts the SPAG document N64 (version 1.6, as amended with respect to confirmation of project leaders) as ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
101Plenary
Adopt SPAG N75 as the information model for main entities used within SC 4
To fulfil objective #b6 of the SC 4 Strategic Policy and to embed consistency in the SC 4 procedures proposed in SC 4 Resolution #84 as well as in the SC 4 policies, SC 4 adopts SPAG N75 as the inf...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
